text: What is the best defense against pirates?

options.text: Active armed counter-fire at all times
Do not go to a pirate-affected area
Speeding up the vessel to 40 knots
Painting the hull white to blind them

explanation: Avoiding pirate-affected areas is the most effective preventative strategy, often facilitated by AIS monitoring and compliance with Best Management Practices (BMP). Other options, like active armed fire or extreme speed, are either dangerous or impractical.
